messages.content:
You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
Two individuals are walking side-by-side along a narrow, dimly lit city sidewalk at night, engaged in an active conversation with animated hand gestures. The surrounding setting features brick buildings and parked cars, heavily cast in dark shadows and illuminated by the pale yellow glow of distant streetlamps. The subjects wear dark jackets and pants, with their faces occasionally catching faint, warm light from a nearby storefront. Throughout the duration, their physical movement remains minimal, limited to slow steps and slight head turns as they interact. The camera executes a slow, continuous horizontal pan to the left, tracking the pair as they advance down the quiet, atmospheric street.

Write one caption per style. Rules:
- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.
- Every caption must reflect the actual content of the clip (subjects, actions, setting).
- "formal": Professional, objective, factual tone. No jokes, no slang.
- "sarcastic": Dry, ironic, lightly mocking. Deadpan delivery.
- "humorous_tech": Funny, built on technology or programming references (bugs, infinite loops, deploys, Wi-Fi, CPUs, git...).
- "humorous_non_tech": Funny, everyday observational humour anyone would get. Absolutely no technical jargon.

Example (for a clip of a dog chasing its tail on a lawn):
{
  "formal": "A golden retriever spins in circles chasing its tail on a sunlit suburban lawn.",
  "sarcastic": "Yes, keep spinning — the tail is definitely about to surrender any minute now.",
  "humorous_tech": "Infinite loop detected: dog.chase(tail) has no exit condition and the CPU is extremely fluffy.",
  "humorous_non_tech": "Somewhere on this lawn, a dog is losing a race against his own back half."
}

Respond with ONLY a JSON object with exactly these keys: "formal", "sarcastic", "humorous_tech", "humorous_non_tech".

{"formal": "Two individuals converse while walking along a dimly lit urban sidewalk at night, tracked by a slow leftward camera pan.", "sarcastic": "Thrilling cinema: two people walking slowly, talking, and somehow the camera is even less committed than they are.", "humorous_tech": "Two humans execute night_mode.exe with verbose hand gestures while the camera follows in an infinite left-scroll loop.", "humorous_non_tech": "Two friends take a nighttime stroll so slow even the streetlamps are falling asleep waiting for them to pass."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A thick blanket of fog steadily rolls over a series of rolling hills during the early morning. The scene is captured from a completely static position, showing the mist actively flowing down the slopes and into the valleys below. The ambient light is dim, casting a cool grayish-blue hue across the landscape, with faint silhouettes of dark pine trees emerging through the dense vapor. White and light gray clouds of mist move horizontally across the frame, driven by a moderate breeze, while the underlying terrain remains completely still.

Write one caption per style. Rules:
- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.
- Every caption must reflect the actual content of the clip (subjects, actions, setting).
- "formal": Professional, objective, factual tone. No jokes, no slang.
- "sarcastic": Dry, ironic, lightly mocking. Deadpan delivery.
- "humorous_tech": Funny, built on technology or programming references (bugs, infinite loops, deploys, Wi-Fi, CPUs, git...).
- "humorous_non_tech": Funny, everyday observational humour anyone would get. Absolutely no technical jargon.

Example (for a clip of a dog chasing its tail on a lawn):
{
  "formal": "A golden retriever spins in circles chasing its tail on a sunlit suburban lawn.",
  "sarcastic": "Yes, keep spinning — the tail is definitely about to surrender any minute now.",
  "humorous_tech": "Infinite loop detected: dog.chase(tail) has no exit condition and the CPU is extremely fluffy.",
  "humorous_non_tech": "Somewhere on this lawn, a dog is losing a race against his own back half."
}

Respond with ONLY a JSON object with exactly these keys: "formal", "sarcastic", "humorous_tech", "humorous_non_tech".

{"formal": "Morning fog flows over rolling hills, partially obscuring silhouetted pine trees in dim, cool-toned light.", "sarcastic": "Great, the hills are literally doing their own spooky entrance and nobody's even awake to see it.", "humorous_tech": "Nature's fog machine deploys successfully to prod; rollback to clear skies is not an option.", "humorous_non_tech": "The hills are trying to ghost everyone and honestly, it's working."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
An aerial drone captures an early morning thunderstorm advancing across a flat coastal landscape. Dark grey and bruised purple cumulonimbus clouds billow heavily on the horizon, illuminated by intermittent flashes of white lightning from within. Below the storm, a thin layer of pale blue morning mist hangs over the calm ocean and dark green shoreline. The drone executes a steady, moderate forward tracking movement, smoothly closing the distance toward the severe weather front. Simultaneously, the thick storm clouds exhibit continuous churning motion as they expand and slowly roll inland.

Write one caption per style. Rules:
- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.
- Every caption must reflect the actual content of the clip (subjects, actions, setting).

  "humorous_non_tech": "Somewhere on this lawn, a dog is losing a race against his own back half."
}

{"formal": "An aerial drone tracks forward toward a thunderstorm advancing across a flat coastal landscape at dawn.", "sarcastic": "Great vacation spot, really nailed the itinerary there.", "humorous_tech": "Drone deploys to prod without checking weather.gov API; incident report incoming.", "humorous_non_tech": "Someone's about to find out if their drone insurance covers 'angry sky'."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A massive desert dune occupies the center of the frame as a solitary figure runs rapidly down its steep slope. The dark, shadowed sand contrasts sharply with the deep indigo sky and the faint, warm orange glow lingering along the horizon. The handheld camera follows the runner in a fast, continuous tracking motion, shifting side to side with their erratic path and kicking up clouds of loose sand. Surrounding ridgelines appear as sharp, black silhouettes against the fading light, while the quick, continuous downward movement creates a constant, rushing perspective across the uneven terrain.

{"formal": "A lone figure descends a steep desert dune at twilight, filmed with rapid handheld tracking motion.", "sarcastic": "Running downhill on sand: nature's treadmill with absolutely no graceful exit strategy.", "humorous_tech": "git commit -m 'descend dune' git push --force sand deployed to production, no rollback possible.", "humorous_non_tech": "This person saw a slope and chose violence against their own ankles."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A pair of hands is kneading a round mass of pale dough on a dark granite countertop. The setting is a brightly lit kitchen, with midday sunlight casting sharp shadows across the workspace. The low-angle close-up emphasizes the texture of the flour-dusted dough and the subtle movements of the fingers pressing into it. In the background, a blurred wooden rolling pin and a small glass bowl of white flour sit on the counter. The motion is minimal, consisting only of slow, deliberate presses and folds of the dough, with no camera movement.

{"formal": "Hands knead pale dough on a dark granite countertop in a sunlit kitchen with a rolling pin and flour bowl in the background.", "sarcastic": "Thrilling footage of someone aggressively doing nothing to dough for thirty seconds.", "humorous_tech": "Manual override engaged: human CPU handles folding algorithm while gluten threads execute in background.", "humorous_non_tech": "This dough is getting the most intense massage of its life and still hasn't relaxed."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
Three brown and white horses stand together in a large, fenced grassy paddock as a cool morning light slowly brightens. The animals remain mostly motionless, occasionally shifting their weight or lowering their heads to graze. A wooden fence bounds the green field, and a simple metal water trough sits near the lower left. The lighting transitions from a dim, bluish dawn hue to a brighter, golden-tinted daylight across the duration of the video. A fixed camera captures the entire scene without moving, while the rapid shadows of trees shorten across the grass.

- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.

{"formal": "Three horses stand in a fenced paddock as dawn light transitions to golden daylight.", "sarcastic": "Three horses achieve absolutely nothing in a field for several hours and call it morning.", "humorous_tech": "Three biological servers idling at 5% CPU utilization while awaiting a grass patch deployment.", "humorous_non_tech": "Three horses hold a very important standing competition where everyone wins by not moving."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
An expansive desert landscape dominated by undulating sand dunes stretches toward the horizon under a high midday sun. The dunes are mostly stationary, with fine sand particles drifting slightly along the upper ridgelines in the wind. Prominent golden and pale yellow hues define the sunlit slopes, contrasting sharply with the deep brown and black shadows nestled in the steep troughs. A few dried, leafless shrubs sit partially buried in the sand near the bottom of the dunes. The camera maintains a high aerial perspective, gliding slowly forward over the terrain with minimal panning.

Nature's really outdone itself.", "humorous_tech": "Server farm relocated to Sahara. Uptime: 99.9%, cooling: deprecated, Wi-Fi signal: buried.", "humorous_non_tech": "Even the tumbleweeds looked at this desert and said 'nah, too boring'."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A small tabby kitten is seen exploring a garden illuminated by the early morning light, with visible shadows slowly retreating across the scene. The environment features vibrant green grass and soil, decorated with prominent orange and yellow flowers. The kitten moves continuously around the garden, pacing through the vegetation, while the surrounding natural light undergoes a noticeable transition. The camera remains completely static throughout the sequence, capturing the moderate motion of the shifting shadows and the rapidly darting kitten against the brightly colored flora.

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
An aerial drone captures a continuous top-down view of a bustling outdoor street food stall during golden hour. Two vendors rapidly spread batter across a massive circular griddle, using long metal spatulas to continuously chop and flip dozens of sizzling pancakes. The cooking dough turns a crisp golden brown, contrasting sharply with the dark metal surface, bright red chili sauce, and scattered green cilantro. Thick steam violently rises from the griddle as the vendors' hands move in a frantic blur of continuous chopping motion. The drone slowly rotates while descending, maintaining a wide aerial perspective over the cooking food and the textured pavement below.

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
An aerial drone captures an old town square in the early morning, slowly gliding forward over the historic urban landscape. The empty cobblestone plaza is bordered by aged multi-story buildings with terracotta rooftops and faded pastel facades. A central stone fountain and several black iron streetlamps stand prominently in the middle of the square. Long, soft shadows stretch across the gray paving stones, illuminated by the warm, low-angle light of the rising sun. The drone steadily descends and pans right, while a few small birds dart across the open space.

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
An aerial drone glides smoothly through a large server room illuminated by warm, golden-hour sunlight filtering through tall windows. Rows of black metal server racks line the glossy floor, their front panels densely packed with small, blinking green and amber LEDs. The drone moves forward at a moderate pace, tilting slightly to navigate between the narrow aisles of equipment. As the camera advances, the blinking lights rhythmically flash across the machines, while long shadows stretch across the reflective surface. Thick bundles of blue and black cables hang neatly from the overhead trays, remaining completely static as the drone passes beneath them.

- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.

{"formal": "A drone navigates between server racks with blinking LEDs in a sunlit data center.", "sarcastic": "Great, machines that blink all day and still get more sunlight than I do.", "humorous_tech": "Finally, a server room deploy that actually went to production without any cables panicking.", "humorous_non_tech": "Even the computers get a golden hour glow-up while I'm stuck under fluorescent lights."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A black quadcopter drone sits on a dry, grassy field illuminated by warm golden-hour sunlight that casts long shadows across the ground. The drone's four rotors begin to spin rapidly, blurring into translucent discs as they kick up small dust clouds from the dirt. The camera maintains a low-angle close-up, tilting upward to track the device as it ascends vertically into the glowing orange sky. Surrounding the airspace, out-of-focus golden grasses sway gently in the foreground while the drone steadily rises. The device's red and green indicator lights blink sharply against the deep amber backdrop as it gains altitude.

- Each caption is a single sentence, at most 30 words, in English.

{"formal": "A quadcopter drone ascends vertically from a sunlit grassy field, its spinning rotors kicking up dust as indicator lights blink against the amber sky.", "sarcastic": "Yes, a flying machine that can go anywhere, and it's choosing to leave the one place with free charging.", "humorous_tech": "Drone deployed to production with zero tests; rotors spinning, logs unclear, but the green light says it's fine.", "humorous_non_tech": "Four tiny fans and a dream lift off to find whoever keeps calling it 'unmanned' when it clearly has commitment issues."}

You write video captions. Below is a factual description of a video clip.

Description:
A mountain stream cascades rapidly over a bed of dark, jagged rocks, pushing frothy white water downstream. The surrounding environment is heavily shadowed, with only faint moonlight revealing the silhouette of dense evergreen trees and steep terrain along the water's edge. Deep blue and black tones dominate the dark forest setting, sharply contrasted by the bright, churning white currents of the rushing water. The overall motion is moderate, primarily driven by the continuous, turbulent flow of the stream navigating the uneven riverbed. A slow, lateral camera pan tracks parallel to the waterway, steadily revealing more of the rocky channel and the dark, motionless tree line.

Description:
A black quadcopter drone sits on a concrete surface, with its propellers beginning to spin and lift the device into the air. The early morning light casts a soft, bluish hue over the surrounding area, which consists of an open paved courtyard and a distant treeline. The drone's white and black plastic casing stands out sharply against the grey ground, and its four landing legs retract slightly as it hovers just above the pavement. The camera executes a continuous, slow horizontal pan to the right, keeping the hovering drone centered in the view while the background shifts gradually. Apart from the spinning propellers and the rising aircraft, the overall scene remains static.
